name: Red Lobster Easy Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lorna Doone cookies, (10 ounces) crush
recipeInstructions:
CRUST - Mix the crushed cookies with melted butter, sugar, and gelatin. Press the mixture into the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for exactly 8 minutes.
FILLING - Beat the cream cheese, sour cream, eggs, butter, cornstarch, sugar, and vanilla until smooth and creamy. Pour the filling over the crust. Return to the oven and bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a rack for 20 minutes before removing the springform pan. Cool another 20 minutes before cutting. Sprinkle with crushed cookie crumbs.
Source: Gloria Pitzer's Secret Recipes Newsletter
